hooks.command:
state=$([ -f /tmp/claude-frollz-state.md ] && printf '

## Restored Session State
%s' "$(cat /tmp/claude-frollz-state.md)" || true); msg="CRITICAL RULE: NEVER perform ANY operation directly on main. ALL work must be done in a new branch created off of 'development'. Branch naming: feature/{issue-number}-{issue-title-slug}. Steps before any new work: git checkout development && git fetch origin && git pull origin development && git checkout -b feature/{issue-number}-{slug}.${state}"; echo "{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": $(printf '%s' "$msg" | jq -Rs .)}}"

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreCompact", "additionalContext": "Before compacting: write a brief summary to /tmp/claude-frollz-state.md covering (1) the task you are working on, (2) what has been completed, (3) what remains, (4) key decisions made. This restores context after compaction."}}'

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); if echo "$f" | grep -q 'frollz-api/'; then cd /Users/joshholl/Source/frollz/frollz-api && npm test -- --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -10 || exit 2; elif echo "$f" | grep -q 'frollz-ui/'; then cd /Users/joshholl/Source/frollz/frollz-ui && npm test 2>&1 | tail -10 || exit 2; fi

hooks.statusMessage: Resyncing codebase knowledge graph after pull...
hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git pull'; then codebase-memory-mcp cli index_repository '{"repository_path": "/Users/joshholl/Source/frollz", "incremental": true}' 2>/dev/null || true; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q '^git commit'; then command -v semgrep >/dev/null 2>&1 && semgrep scan --config p/default --config p/typescript --metrics=off 2>&1 | tail -40 || true; fi
